items.title: BBC extends deal for Scotland games until June 2028
items.summary: Men's international games for Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland will continue to be broadcast on the BBC.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Evans 'happy with decision' to retire after Wimbledon
items.summary: Great Britain's Dan Evans says he is "happy" with his decision to retire after Wimbledon after his singles career came to an end as he suffered a defeat to Tristan Schoolkate in...
